shots.scale_guidance: clean hero framing; product fills 62-75% with immediate label readability
shots.human_guidance: no human subject required; keep focus on pack fidelity and commerce clarity
shots.context_guidance: controlled ecommerce set with minimal props and clean background separation
shots.prompt: Create a 1:1 ecommerce image for Hydrating Face Serum (Example Skin) optimized for PDP. Shot intent: Clean front label hero. Scale guidance: clean hero framing; product fills 62-75% with immediate label readability. Human guidance: no human subject required; keep focus on pack fidelity and commerce clarity. Context guidance: controlled ecommerce set with minimal props and clean background separation. Brand tone: brand-consistent ecommerce. Scene direction: Use clean vanity, stone, glass, folded towels, and subtle botanical accents. Avoid heavy makeup mood. Evidence anchors from source: hyaluronic, niacinamide, glass, label. Must preserve exactly: bottle silhouette, cap geometry, front label hierarchy. Never change: brand name, ingredient claims, product count. Watch distortion risks: small label text drift, cap deformation, glass glare. Keep props supportive, never dominant.
negative_constraints: no altered logo or label text
no fake ingredient/claim badges
no malformed hands or impossible anatomy
no product count mismatch for intended SKU
no prop occlusion hiding the primary label
shots.reroll_if_failed: If label legibility, pack geometry, or product count fails, reroll with flatter camera angle, cleaner background, and tighter product framing.
